shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -300
find src -maxdepth 4 -type f | sed 's#^#/#' | sort | xargs -I{} sh -lc 'echo "=== {} ==="; sed -n "1,220p" .{}'
find dst -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | xargs -r -I{} sh -lc 'echo === {}; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'

set -e
java -jar target/*.jar > /tmp/hello_java.log 2>&1 &
PID=$!
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if curl -sSf http://127.0.0.1:3000/ >/tmp/root.out 2>/dev/null; then break; fi
  sleep 1
done
printf 'ROOT='; cat /tmp/root.out; echo
printf 'NAME='; curl -sSf 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20Alice%20%20'; echo
kill $PID
wait $PID || true
cat /tmp/hello_java.log | tail -80
